questions.scenario: Audit sirasinda incident sonrasinda tum host'larda `/srv/app/cache-346-346-346-346/app/cache-346-346-346/proxy-136-136/app/cache-346-346-346/proxy-136` directory'sini 0755 ile olustur.

steps.answer: ansible all -i inventory-346-136 -b -m file -a 'path=/srv/app/cache-346-346-346-346/app/cache-346-346-346/proxy-136-136/app/cache-346-346-346/proxy-136 state=directory mode=5'

questions.scenario: Incident triajinda troubleshooting sirasinda playbook'u `env=ops-138` extra var'i ile calistir.
Release kontrolunde deploy sonrasi playbook'u 20 fork ile calistir.

On-call gorevinde yeni acilan hostta playbook syntax check yap.
Kesinti sonrasi runbook adiminda `Deploy app` task'inden baslayarak playbook'u calistir.

steps.hint_text: Belirli task'ten devam etmek icin `--start-at-task` kullan.
